testcase.name: test_convert_basic_preventivo
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_convert_to_invoice.py:95: in test_client assert response.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create client: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create client: {"detail":[{"type":"enum","loc":["body","client_type"],"msg":"Input should be 'azienda', 'privato' or 'pa'","input":"business","ctx":{"expected":"'azienda', 'privato' or 'pa'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/enum"}]} E assert 422 == 201 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
